degraded.description:
When true, the producer fell back: downstream consumers MUST NOT treat the
decision as authoritative and MUST short-circuit "use the decision" logic.

degradedReason.description: Why the response degraded (present only when `degraded` is true).

headSha.description: The commit SHA at the head of the change under evaluation.

baseSha.description: The base commit SHA the change merges into.

mergeGroupId.description: The merge group / queue batch this evaluation belongs to.

evaluatorTier.description: The evaluator tier that produced the response (e.g. Tier 1 merge-gate, Tier 2 e2e).

description:
The semantic-merge-queue `_meta` block (#63). Spreads the universal
`ResponseMetaV1` degraded seam and adds the merge-context fields that pin a
response to a specific merge attempt: the head/base SHAs, the merge group, and
the evaluator tier (Tier 1 merge-gate / Tier 2 e2e) that produced it.
